hero.title: Mayday
hero.reason: In honor of May Day, a traditional spring holiday celebrated on May 1, this film's setting and themes of renewal make it a fitting choice for today.
hero.blurb: Mayday is a thought-provoking drama that explores the complexities of human relationships, set against the backdrop of a mysterious and potentially catastrophic event. With its strong performances and tight direction, this film is sure to leave you on the edge of your seat. As the world celebrates the arrival of spring, Mayday offers a compelling and unsettling counterpoint.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero blockbuster marked a significant milestone in the Spider-Man franchise, with its visually stunning action sequences and intricate plot twists.
released.blurb: Spider-Man 3 is an action-packed adventure that brings together memorable characters, stunning visuals, and a gripping narrative. While it may not be the strongest installment in the series, it still delivers plenty of excitement and fan service. With its blend of humor, drama, and spectacle, this film remains an enjoyable ride.

birthday.title: Glory

birthday.blurb: Glory is a powerful and moving drama that tells the story of the first all-black regiment in the American Civil War, with outstanding performances from its talented cast. Tim Robbins brings depth and nuance to his role, helping to make this film a memorable and impactful experience.

awful.title: Battlefield Earth
awful.reason: a famously bad movie with terrible reviews, numerous Razzie Awards, and a reputation for being one of the worst films of the 2000s, making it a prime candidate for a so-bad-it's-good viewing experience.
awful.blurb: Battlefield Earth is a mind-bogglingly bad sci-fi epic, with cringe-worthy dialogue, atrocious acting, and a convoluted plot that defies comprehension. While it's certainly a trainwreck, it's also a fascinating case study in how not to make a movie, making it a morbidly entertaining watch for fans of cinematic disasters.
